title: Universal Basic Income (UBI)
html: Stub. Yahir adds "Thoughts on ubi" three times to his todo column in 2022 10 25 ahmad jamal stream and pairs it with: "Protocol or business that streamlines airdrop to users. Can be bumped to UBI dividend payments world coin style."
